def positive_lambda_or_closure_allocated_per_item_when_static_helper_suffices():
    rule_id = "lambda_or_closure_allocated_per_item_when_static_helper_suffices"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag per-item closure allocation in hot loops when a stable helper would work."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
